meaning: National Association for the Advancement of Colored People (美国)全国有色人种协进会
examples: Harlem, still a NAACP stronghold, has become an education battlefield.
When he took over the helm in September 2008, the NAACP had been in turmoil for several years.
It is this context that makes elements of Barack Obama's speech to the NAACP conference problematic.
Watching Mitt talk to the NAACP yesterday made me feel I was back in the sixties.
